hero.headline: Selling Woodworking Projects to Take My Family to Disney World
hero.subheadline: Follow the journey. Support the mission. Own a custom piece built with purpose.

storyHighlight.heading: The Journey
storyHighlight.text: This isn't just a side hustle — it's a real-time mission to fund a family trip to Disney World through handcrafted woodworking. Every project sold brings us one step closer. Follow along, support the mission, and own a custom piece built with purpose and love.

ctaSection.heading: Have an idea? Let's build it.

portfolioPreview.heading: Recent Work
portfolioPreview.subheading: A selection of custom projects built with care and craftsmanship.
